sutta: the buddha said monks by wrong conduct to watch 4 persons the foolish sinful inauthentic man carries about with him an uprooted lifeless self is blameworthy is censured by the intelligent and begets much demerit who are the 4 monks it is by wrong conduct towards mother father a tattagata and a tatar gathers disciples that the foolish sinful inauthentic man begets much demerit but monks by right conduct towards these same 4 persons the wise virtuous authentic man carries about with him a self not uprooted not lifeless he is not blameworthy he begets much merit suta refers to 4 persons sometimes they are called the 4 fields of merit and also the 4 fields of the merit that is our parents and then the buddha himself and then the buddha's disciples that means monks and nancy you see the buddha is already not in the world so we [Music] we can forget about or conduct towards the buddha but our parents especially for a lot of people sometimes if we neglect our parents uh or we are unfailing uh we don't do our duty towards our parents and after they pass away then we feel a lot of remorse and it gives us a lot of [Music] pain so if we uh provide for our parents and look after them well and after they pass away it will bring us a lot of joy so towards the buddha's disciples banks and nuns also we have to be careful especially if we intend to speak anything ill about monks and nuns we have to consider very carefully and so these are the 4 fields of merit now and the 4 fields of the married also [Music] ah now this would turn the next 2 times
